subcodes.first_line: O thou ignited candle! Thy letter was received. Its contents imparted spiritual gladness... When man's soul is rarefied and cleansed, spiritual links are established, and from these bonds
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع روشن نامه شما رسید و از مضمون فرح روحانی حاصل گردید زیرا مضمون مشحون
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prophecy and fulfillment
